text.title: EF Core Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce entity + configuration + repository + migration.

step.name: design-entity
step.action: Define POCO entity with private setters and a parameterless protected constructor (for EF materialization). Initialize collection properties in constructor.
step.decision-gate: If the entity carries data annotations, FAIL and move them to configuration.

step.name: fluent-configuration
step.action: Write `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>` with `ToTable`, `HasKey`, `Property(...).IsRequired().HasMaxLength`, `HasIndex`, foreign-key cascade. Register via `modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly` in DbContext.

step.name: repository
step.action: Define `I<Entity>Repository` returning `PagedResult<TDto>` for list queries (with `.AsNoTracking()` + projection + `Skip/Take`). Implementation calls `SaveChangesAsync(ct)` on writes; does NOT return `IQueryable`.

step.name: migration
step.action: Run `dotnet ef migrations add <VerbPrefix>` (e.g. `AddOrdersTable`, `AlterOrderAddCarrier`). Inspect generated `Up()`. Pair with a CI step `dotnet ef migrations script` and diff against last release.

step.name: multi-collection-audit
step.action: For each query with `≥ 2` collection `Include`, append `.AsSplitQuery()`. Add a unit-test query plan check (`db.Database.SqlQueryRaw("SET STATISTICS ...")`).
step.decision-gate: If query still produces Cartesian counts in plan, refactor to projection.
